template.name: Prospect Research — Champion Brief
template.description: Person-level deep dossier generator. Per-contact: career history + recent LinkedIn activity + public POVs + role scope + mutual connections + recent job change + personalized entry line + warm intro path. Output: champion brief markdown ready to hand to /clay-outbound or AE 1:1 prep.
template.estimated_cost_per_row: 45-75 credits per prospect at STANDARD depth
template.expected_match_rate: 95%+ contact enrichment; 70%+ usable personalized entry line

columns.name: linkedin_url
columns.notes: Primary key — preferred over email for prospect research

columns.name: seniority
columns.formula_text: IF(title CONTAINS "C-level" OR title CONTAINS "Chief" OR title CONTAINS "CEO" OR title CONTAINS "CRO" OR title CONTAINS "CMO" OR title CONTAINS "CTO", "C-level", IF(title CONTAINS "VP" OR title CONTAINS "Vice President", "VP", IF(title CONTAINS "Director" OR title CONTAINS "Head of", "Director", IF(title CONTAINS "Manager", "Manager", "IC"))))

columns.name: pass_1_relevant
columns.formula_text: AND(seniority IN [{{TARGET_SENIORITY}}], company_domain IS NOT NULL, NOT(title CONTAINS "Intern"))

columns.name: linkedin_about
columns.claygent_prompt: Scrape the LinkedIn About section for {linkedin_url}. Return the raw text (max 500 chars) as a single string field 'about'. If unavailable, return 'about': null.

columns.name: tenure_months_in_role
columns.claygent_prompt: From {linkedin_url}, calculate tenure_months_in_role for the CURRENT role at {company_name}. Return JSON: {"tenure_months": int|null, "start_date": "YYYY-MM"|null}.

columns.name: career_history_summary
columns.claygent_prompt: From {linkedin_url}, return a structured career summary: prior 3 roles + companies + duration. JSON: {"career": [{"company": "", "title": "", "duration": ""}], "pattern_summary": "string (1 sentence on the trajectory)"}.

columns.name: recent_linkedin_posts_90d
columns.claygent_prompt: From {linkedin_url}, list up to 5 recent posts (their own, not reshares) from the last 90 days. JSON: {"posts": [{"date": "YYYY-MM-DD", "topic": "string (5-10 words)", "key_quote": "string (one quote ≤20 words)", "url": ""}]}.

columns.name: recent_public_content
columns.claygent_prompt: Search the web for content authored or featuring {full_name} ({title} at {company_name}) in the last 12 months. Include: blog posts, podcast appearances, panel talks, conference videos. JSON: {"content": [{"type": "blog|podcast|talk|other", "title": "", "url": "", "date": "YYYY-MM-DD"}]}.

columns.name: stated_priorities_or_povs
columns.claygent_prompt:
From their LinkedIn posts ({recent_linkedin_posts_90d.posts}) and public content ({recent_public_content.content}), identify 2-3 STATED priorities or POVs.

JSON: {"povs": [{"pov": "string (15-30 words — direct or implied)", "evidence_url": "", "date": "YYYY-MM-DD"}]}.

FALLBACK: If no clear POVs, return empty array.

columns.name: role_scope
columns.claygent_prompt:
Estimate the role scope for {full_name} ({title} at {company_name}).

Return JSON: {"team_size_estimate": "<10|10-50|50-200|200+|unknown", "budget_authority_signal": "none|partial|full|unknown", "reports_to_likely": "title-only (e.g. CRO, CEO)"}.

columns.name: mutual_connections
columns.claygent_prompt: Check shared 1st-degree connections between {linkedin_url} and {{SENDER_LINKEDIN_URLS}}. JSON: {"mutuals": [{"name": "", "title": "", "strength": "high|med|low"}]}.

columns.name: recent_job_change
columns.notes: Optional — fall back to Claygent if no provider

columns.name: champion_score
columns.formula_text: (IF(seniority IN ["VP", "C-level"], 3, IF(seniority == "Director", 2, 1))) + (IF(tenure_months_in_role >= 12 AND tenure_months_in_role <= 36, 2, 1)) + (IF(LENGTH(stated_priorities_or_povs.povs) >= 2, 2, IF(LENGTH(stated_priorities_or_povs.povs) >= 1, 1, 0))) + (IF(role_scope.budget_authority_signal IN ["partial", "full"], 2, 0)) + (IF(recent_job_change IS NOT NULL, 1, 0))
columns.notes: 10-point scale: 0-4 weak, 5-7 viable, 8-10 strong champion candidate

columns.name: personalized_entry_line
columns.claygent_prompt:
ROLE: Peer-to-peer B2B sales rep writing the OPENING line of a cold email.

CONTEXT:
- Recipient: {full_name}, {title}
- Recent posts: {recent_linkedin_posts_90d.posts}
- POVs: {stated_priorities_or_povs.povs}

TASK:
Write ONE sentence (15-25 words) that:
- Leads with a SPECIFIC observation from their content (NOT "I came across" or "I noticed")
- Sounds like a colleague, not a vendor
- References a quote or stance they took

Banned words: unlock, leverage, supercharge, hope, came across, noticed
Banned starts: "I", "Hope", "Hi {name}"

FORMAT:
Return the sentence ONLY. No quotes, no signature.

FALLBACK:
If no specific content, return: "[no personalization available]" — this will gate downstream outbound.
columns.notes: Critical: run /clay-claygent-iterator on this prompt before scaling past 25 rows

columns.name: warm_intro_path
columns.formula_text: IF(LENGTH(mutual_connections.mutuals) > 0 AND mutual_connections.mutuals[0].strength == "high", CONCAT("WARM via ", mutual_connections.mutuals[0].name), "COLD")

columns.name: prospect_brief_markdown
columns.formula_text:
CONCAT("# ", full_name, " — ", title, " @ ", company_name, "

**Champion score:** ", champion_score, "/10 · **Warm path:** ", warm_intro_path, "

## Career trajectory
", career_history_summary.pattern_summary, "

## Stated POVs
", stated_priorities_or_povs.povs, "

## Role scope
Team: ", role_scope.team_size_estimate, " · Budget: ", role_scope.budget_authority_signal, " · Reports to: ", role_scope.reports_to_likely, "

## Job change signal
", IF(recent_job_change IS NOT NULL, recent_job_change, "None detected"), "

## Personalized entry line
> ", personalized_entry_line, "
")

verification_checklist: 5-row sample: personalized_entry_line passes Read-Out-Loud test (sounds like a peer, not a vendor)
champion_score distribution looks right (most should land 3-7; high scores rare)
Run /clay-claygent-iterator on personalized_entry_line prompt before scaling past 25 rows
warm_intro_path is COLD on >50% (otherwise mutual connections lookup is over-fitting)
